text: Reaction: After a character you control loses a conflict as an attacker, bow this stronghold. Choose a non-Champion character - bow that character.
name: Kyūden Ikoma

text: Reaction: After you lose a conflict at this province - honor each defending character.
flavorText: It stands as a testament to the limits of Scorpion ambition.
name: Kenson no Gakka

text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on [clan-lion] clan cards.
name: Support of the Lion

text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose another copy of this card in your provinces or discard pile - put that character into play.
flavorText: Ashigaru of the Lion Clan benefit from better training, better equipment, and greater numbers than those of any other clan.
name: Ashigaru Levy

flavorText: "Your soldiers will follow you into the darkest valley, and fight in the blackest night, if they are illuminated by your honor." - Akodo's Leadership
name: Samurai of Integrity

text: This character does not bow as the result of conflict resolution during conflicts in which it is attacking with 2 or more other Bushi characters.
flavorText: "Why'd you want to fight me when you'd do such a bad job of it."
name: Matsu Gohei

text: Reaction: After an opponent's card ability or ring effect dishonors a character you control - take 2 honor from that opponent.
flavorText: "You expect Akodo-san to care about an insult conceived by a novice, when he has singlehandedly repelled eight different Unicorn assaults on Juntou no Shiro?"
name: Ardent Omoidasu

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent, choose a character that opponent controls - move that character to the conflict.
name: Kitsu Motso

text: Reaction: After an opponent's card ability or ring effect discards 1 or more cards from your hand - that opponent discards an equal number of cards at random from his or her hand.
flavorText: "You may find that honor carries a different meaning in this battlefield."
name: Akodo Motivator

text: Action: Choose a character you control - play a [clan-lion] character from your dynasty discard pile as an attachment on the chosen character, reducing its cost by 1. Treat this attachment as if its printed text box were blank. It gains the Spirit trait and the text: "Limit 1 Spirit per character. Add this card's printed [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill values to those of attached character."
name: Voice of the Ancestors

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the attacker against a non-stronghold province, if you are more honorable than your opponent – break the attacked province.
flavorText: "We will make them cower for their insults, and Arasou will be avenged."
name: Matsu Tsuko

text: No attachments except Spirit. Reaction: After a character you control loses a conflict as the attacker, bow your stronghold - put this character into play from your dynasty discard pile. If it is in play at the end of the phase, remove it from the game.
name: Champions of Yomi

text: Forced Reaction: After a player wins a conflict - that player gains 1 honor. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "In these records, you will be remembered for the next thousand years."
name: Hall of Victories

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, choose an attacking character with higher [conflict-military] skill than this character - move the chosen character home.
flavorText: "As a samurai in service to my clan, I cannot allow you to spread the Taint any further."
name: Yasuki Hikaru

text: While this character is participating in a conflict, players cannot trigger reaction abilities.
flavorText: Each poem spun discloses a trace of the wondrous forest home to which he hopes to one day return.
name: Doji Kuzunobu

text: Reaction: After you honor or dishonor a character by the effect of the [element-fire] ring - each other character with the same printed cost as the chosen character controlled by the same player receives the same ring effect as that character.
name: Isawa Tsuke

text: Each honored character controlled by an opponent has a base glory of 0.
flavorText: "I fear I can offer nothing of value for your investigation. I generally leave matters of murder in Denmaru's hands." - Shosuro Hyobu
name: Shosuro Denmaru

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if your opponent is more honorable than you, he or she must choose a ready character he or she controls - move that character to the conflict.
name: Moto Ariq

text: Keeper role only. This character cannot be declared as an attacker unless you spend 1 fate.
name: Caravan Guard

text: Seeker role only. This character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] for each honored character your opponent controls.
flavorText: "I could defeat any samurai who thinks themselves great just because of which clan they serve."
name: Insolent Outcast

text: Attach to a Commander character. Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - search the top 4 cards of your conflict deck for an event, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle."
name: Tactical Ingenuity

text: Attach to an unbroken province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province. Forced Reaction: After a player loses a conflict at attached province - that player must sacrifice a participating character.
name: Total Warfare

text: Reaction: After a Bushi character you control loses a conflict as the attacker, sacrifice it. Choose a character controlled by your opponent - if that character has no fate on it, discard it. Otherwise, remove 1 fate from it.
name: Embrace Death

text: Action: If you have claimed a [conflict-military] ring, choose a character - honor that character.
flavorText: "With victory, your foe is set back. With honor, your foe is vanquished." - Akodo's Leadership
name: Honor in Battle

text: Action: Choose a character you control - you may discard any number of attachments and/or status tokens from it. If that character is a Commander, honor it.
name: Prepare for War

text: If you are more honorable than an opponent, you can play this card from your discard pile. Action: Choose up to 6 printed cost worth of Bushi characters you control - ready each of those characters. Put this card on the bottom of its owner's conflict deck.
name: Right Hand of the Emperor

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose up to 3 cards in a player's discard pile - remove them from the game.
flavorText: "If only Doji-sama's recordings were not as frustratingly secretive as he was when he was alive..."
name: Kitsuki Kāgi

text: Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.) Action: During the dynasty phase - reduce the cost for each character you play this phase by 1 (to a minimum of 1). Errata from Imperial Law (2020-04-06).
name: Those Who Serve
